data.title: European Blockchain Sandbox develops privacy-focused KYC solutions with IOTA's Tokenized KYC. Visit IOTA Blog for details.
data.description: The European Blockchain Sandbox has unveiled valuable information regarding compliant identity verification in Web3, showcasing the Tokenized KYC Solution developed by the IOTA Foundation. The insights provided shed light on the importance of adhering to regulations within the blockchain space. For more details, visit the IOTA Blog.

data.title: Proven Winners® expands by merging Pleasant View Gardens and Four Star Greenhouse, forming one company under Staple Street Capital.
data.description: DeKalb, Illinois - Proven Winners®, a prominent consumer gardening brand in North America, has revealed a significant development in its established history. Formerly functioning as separate entities overseeing and managing the Proven Winners trademark in North America, Pleasant View Gardens in Loudon, New Hampshire, and Four Star Greenhouse in Carleton, Michigan, have opted to merge and establish a unified company, Proven Winners (the "Company"), consolidating under one ownership structure through a partnership agreement.

data.title: Always Best Care launches Studio City location with social worker Amy Balian leading for seniors in LA. #seniorcare #StudioCity #LosAngeles
data.description: Amy Balian, with her wealth of expertise and deep passion for serving seniors, is extending support to the elderly population in the wider Los Angeles region. The renowned senior care franchise system, Always Best Care Senior Services, recently disclosed the inauguration of a new center in Studio City, California on October 9, 2025. This significant move aims to cater to the growing needs of seniors in the community.

data.title: The Greathouse Company partners with Roebuck Landscaping in Nashville, deal facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions.
data.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn., October 9, 2025 - The longstanding local landscaping business, The Greathouse Company, established in 1981, has recently announced a significant development. This family-owned company, serving the Nashville region, has finalized a strategic partnership deal with Roebuck Landscaping from Roebuck. The collaborative agreement was facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions of Nashville, marking a notable move for both companies. The Greathouse Company brings over four decades of experience to the table, offering their expertise to enhance the joint venture. This partnership signifies a period of growth and expansion for the businesses involved.

data.title: Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) stock rises after exceeding third-quarter earnings expectations, with adjusted EPS of $1.71 beating estimates. Unit revenue (RASM) rose by 0.3%.
data.description: Shares of Delta Air Lines (NYSE: DAL) surged in early trading following the release of their impressive third-quarter earnings report. The airline exceeded expectations, reporting an adjusted EPS of $1.71, higher than the estimated $1.53 from FactSet and $1.45 from Goldman Sachs. This figure fell near the upper end of Delta's initial guidance of $1.25 to $1.75, which was issued in September. The strong earnings were primarily attributed to a better-than-anticipated revenue performance, with unit revenue (RASM) increasing by 0.3%, surpassing the predicted 0.8% decline. Analyst Catherine O'Brien from Goldman Sachs praised Delta's results and outlook, leading to a positive market response. Delta Air Lines has raised its full-year profit forecast, signaling confidence for the remainder of the year. For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Soccer 5 USA acquired by Wonder Franchises, facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions. Deal brings new chapter to the community-driven soccer facility operator.
data.description: Viking Mergers & Acquisitions played a key role in facilitating a recent business deal in Miami. On October 9, 2025, Soccer 5 USA, a soccer facility operator established by the Georgeson family, was successfully acquired by Wonder Franchises, a company specializing in multi-unit franchise concepts. This acquisition marks a significant development for both companies. Soccer 5 USA, founded in 2008, has built a strong reputation as a community-driven operator in the soccer industry. Wonder Franchises, on the other hand, is a rapidly growing player in the franchise sector. The deal underscores the value of strategic partnerships in the business world and highlights the potential for growth and expansion in the sports and franchise industries.

data.title: USSFCU celebrates 90 years of service and innovation, marking its anniversary on October 8, 2025.
data.description: In Alexandria, Virginia, on October 9, 2025, the United States Senate Federal Credit Union (USSFCU) commemorated its 90th anniversary. The credit union, established on October 8, 1935, has been recognized for its dedication to members and advancements in financial services over the past 90 years. Originally a modest cooperative on Capitol Hill, USSFCU has evolved significantly since its inception.

data.title: Malaga Financial Corp. reports $16,431,000 net income for 9 months of 2025, a 5% decrease, with $5,481,000 in Q3 net income.
data.description: Malaga Financial Corporation, the parent company of Malaga Bank FSB, reported a net income of $16,431,000 for the nine months ending September 30, 2025, resulting in a 5% decrease from the same period in 2024. The net income for the quarter ending September 30, 2025, was $5,481,000, reflecting a 1% decrease from the previous year. The company's annualized return on average equity for the first nine months of 2025 was 10.15%, and the annualized return on average assets was 1.57%. The decrease in net income was partly due to the absence of a one-time Employment Retention Credit of $500,000 reported in 2024.

data.title: Domino's expected to report lower Q3 earnings at $3.97/share (down from $4.19/share), revenue of $1.14 billion (up from $1.08 billion) on Oct. 14. Shares closed at $413.50.
data.description: Domino's Pizza, Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, October 14. Analysts are predicting earnings of $3.97 per share, lower than the $4.19 per share reported in the same period last year. The company is expected to reveal a quarterly revenue of $1.14 billion, up from $1.08 billion last year. In the second quarter, Domino's surpassed expectations with revenue reaching $1.15 billion. Following this news, the company's shares increased by 0.5% and closed at $413.50 on Wednesday. For more detailed analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga's platform.

data.title: Dow falls over 250 points, Nasdaq down 0.44% to 22,942.90, S&P 500 drops 0.47% to 6,722.31. Delta Air Lines beats estimates.
data.description: During midday trading, U.S. stocks showed a mixed performance, with the Dow Jones index dropping over 250 points on Thursday. The Dow was down by 0.60% at 46,320.74, while the NASDAQ fell by 0.44% to 22,942.90. Additionally, the S&P 500 saw a decline of 0.47% to 6,722.31. Consumer staples shares experienced a 0.3% increase, while industrials stocks fell by 0.9% the previous trading day. Delta Air Lines Inc. (NYSE: DAL) reported better-than-expected adjusted EPS and revenue for Q3, with operating revenue at $16.7 billion, a 6% YoY increase. GAAP EPS was $2.17, up by 10% from the previous year, while adjusted EPS surpassed estimates at $1.71. Delta predicts a 2-4% total revenue growth for the December quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Book intertwines baseball, family, faith, and miracles as angel transforms Rutters' farm; a tale of life's magic.
data.description: A family farm in SCRANTON, Pa., experienced a life-altering event when an angel appeared, transforming the Rutters' lives in a magical way. On Oct. 9, 2025, the seemingly ordinary setting of their farm became the backdrop for a miraculous encounter. The story's author, Peter Paul, highlights how miracles can unfold in the most unexpected places, whether it be in serene fields, under an expansive sky, or amidst the challenges of everyday family dynamics. This encounter serves as a poignant reminder of the potential for extraordinary events to shape our lives, resonating with readers through the power of its storytelling.
